column9: Default BC interpreter to threaded dispatch + reuse + superinstructions + immediates
Sequentialize block-invocation register copies as a parallel copy (register coalescing for loop-carried args)

Induction-variable strength reduction for array indexing (new StrengthReductionPass IR pass): correct (validated via full test suite + differential fuzzer + targeted regression test) but regressed sum benchmark ~17% -- interpreter dispatch cost dominates, so trading 1 MUL for 1 new stride-ADD plus leftover dead ops (uncleaned cast, unfolded ptr+0) plus one extra loop-carried register is a net loss, not a win. Reverted.
